description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a long-sleeve crewneck shirt, straight-cut jeans, and sturdy boots. He wears a baseball cap and a wristwatch on each wrist, adding to his everyday streetwear look. The figure's hands are extended horizontally, and his facial features are partially obscured by the cap. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and practicality for walking or standing in public spaces. The overall build is average, with a realistic human body proportion and posture. Accessories such as the cap and watches enhance the sense of a modern, urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a cap, long-sleeve shirt, jeans, boots, and wristwatches, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a realistic build and urban streetwear style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face partially covered by a cap, both arms extended, and full visibility of the shirt's chest area and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, nose, and boots, with the arm extended and the wristwatch visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the rear of the cap, shirt, jeans, and both arms outstretched, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, cap, and boots, with the right arm extended and the wristwatch visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt, straight-cut jeans, baseball cap, wristwatches
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
